blocks.text: Bodo/Glimt one result from Champions League immortality

Glimt arrive in Italy holding a stunning 3-1 first-leg lead — a draw sends Norway's finest club side into the last 16. New numbers rank them among the world's top three clubs by performance metrics, behind only two global giants.
⚽ 21:00 — Bayer Leverkusen vs Olympiacos, CL second leg — Leverkusen heavy favourites to advance

blocks.label: ⚽ Champions League Wednesday
items: ⚽ Wed 21:00 — AS Monaco vs PSG — PSG lead 3-2 but the French derby is very much alive ★4
⚽ Wed 21:00 — Benfica vs Real Madrid — Madrid's narrow lead tested in Lisbon ★4
⚽ Wed 18:45 — Borussia Dortmund vs Atalanta — Dortmund advance unless Atalanta find two goals
